subcodes.first_line: O thou whose breast is illumined with the lights of the Kingdom on high! Verily, divine wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنشرحة الصدر بانوار الملکوت اعلی ان الحکمة الالهیة
subcodes.subjects: @Judas, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
